private lemma one_le_curlog (hx₀ : 0 ≤ x) (hx₁ : x ≤ 1) : 1 ≤ 𝓛 x := by
  obtain rfl | hx₀ := hx₀.eq_or_lt
  · simp
  have : 0 ≤ log x⁻¹ := by bound

private lemma curlog_pos (hx₀ : 0 ≤ x) (hx₁ : x ≤ 1) : 0 < 𝓛 x := by
  obtain rfl | hx₀ := hx₀.eq_or_lt

  have : 0 ≤ log x⁻¹ := by bound

intro x hx

        simpa using hx
      have : ∀ γ ∈ Δ, γ x = 1 := by
        intro γ hγ
        have hγ' : γ ∈ Δ' := by
          apply hΔ'Δ
          exact hγ
        exact hx' γ hγ'
      simpa using this
    have hW : (↑W : Finset G).card ≤ (↑V : Finset G).card := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card
      exact Submodule.subset.mp hWV
